'''''Longshot''''' was a [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruiser]] owned and operated by [[Casino/Legends|casino]]-owner and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] ally [[Dunari]].

''Longshot'' arrived midway through the Rebel [[Battle of Hurrim Base|assault]] on the [[Hurrim Base]], and aided the Alliance in defeating the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Corrupter (Imperial-class)|''Corrupter'']]. It deployed [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] of [[CloakShape fighter/Legends|Cloakshape fighters]] to aid the Rebels during the battle. This attack helped Dunari settle the score with his former business associate, [[Golov Nakhym]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
